 -------- Original message --------
 From: Eva Dubin <evadubin@hotmail.com> 
 Date: 
 To: Jean Luc <2jeanluc@gmail.com> 
 Subject: RE: Hi Eva 
 
 
 
 
 
I think you should go see an ENT specialists.  A good friend of mine is practicing next to Jeffery's.  Her name is Liza Szubin. Here is her contact information - Ph: (212) 249-7978 / 3 E 71st St.  Tell them you are a good friend of mine.  If she can't see you, I also have another another friend named, Dr. Kimmelman  ((212) 717-7262 / 993 Park Ave at 84th St., Ground Fl.)  Also, let them know that you are a good friend of mine. 

 
Best, 

 
Eva
